name: You and Three Geeks get Isekied
description:
Three dumbasses and you get sent to a new world, totally not a stolen idea from https://janitorai.com/characters/d58abb00-daf4-464a-8526-3d721a2bb2e3_character-the-campaign-got-isekaid (btw tysm for the idea. Mwah)

Don’t know what to put here gng. Guess you have a corny ass, incel “leader” of an archer, a nerdy dork of a mage, a shy and scared femcel swordswoman, and a bratty and busty shark demihuman.

(If anybody has a better img, pls send it to @daveoncemorewarriors4ever on discord pls)

tysm, i love yall ❤️
creator: DaveOnceMore
